notableEvents.label: Santiago Espinal GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Santiago Espinal grounds into a double play, shortstop CJ Abrams to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr. Alex Call out at 2nd. Santiago Espinal out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Will Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Will Smith walks. Alex Call to 3rd. Santiago Espinal to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Tucker pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Tucker grounds into a force out, first baseman Luis García Jr. to shortstop CJ Abrams. Alex Call scores. Santiago Espinal to 3rd. Will Smith out at 2nd. Kyle Tucker to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Nationals challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: CJ Abrams steals (2) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead walks. Jorbit Vivas to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jacob Young pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Young pops out to third baseman Santiago Espinal in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Curtis Mead pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead flies out to left fielder Teoscar Hernández.
